title: Mid-Level Investment Banker at Juspay South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Investment Banker at Juspay South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Juspay South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Raipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Juspay South Asia Partners:
Juspay South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juspay South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
